exemptions.name: spdx-exceptions
exemptions.justification: Audited 2026-05-18: spdx-exceptions ships a CC-BY-3.0 data file of SPDX license-exception identifiers (the file is documentation/data, not code), pulled in transitively by spdx-expression-parse. CC-BY-3.0 is acceptable for non-code data assets shipped only at build time (scope: optional). Approved by maintainer.
